user_request: Create JWT authentication for a Django application

todos.title: Install Django JWT package
todos.description: Run `pip install djangorestframework-jwt` to install the package.

todos.title: Configure settings.py
todos.description: Add 'rest_framework_jwt' to the INSTALLED_APPS in settings.py.

todos.title: Create JWT authentication views
todos.description: Create views for token authentication, e.g., `obtain_jwt_token` and `verify_jwt_token`.

todos.title: Update urls.py
todos.description: Add URL patterns for the JWT authentication views.

todos.title: Update models.py
todos.description: Add a method to generate JWT tokens for users.

todos.title: Update views.py
todos.description: Implement the JWT authentication views using the serializers.

todos.title: Update middleware.py
todos.description: Add middleware to check JWT tokens for authenticated requests.

todos.title: Test JWT authentication
todos.description: Write tests to ensure JWT authentication works as expected.
